message:
test(fj-conformance): add 30 oracle tests for Slice primitive

Comprehensive coverage of lax.slice behavior:
- 1D slicing with start/limit indices
- 1D slicing with strides (2, 3, large stride)
- 2D slicing on rows, columns, submatrix regions
- 2D slicing with strides on row/col/both axes
- 3D slicing across all axis combinations
- Float tensor support
- Edge cases: empty result, partial strides, single element

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
